languages.text: "Отмена Последнего Приказа не требуется. Вы понесете его с собою в Коронус и там воплотите в жизнь!"
"There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"
languages.original_text: "Отмена Последнего Приказа не требуется. Вы понесете его с собою в Коронус и там воплотите в жизнь!"

traits.locale_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall bear it into the Koronus Expanse and bring it to fruition there!"
"There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall bear it into the Koronus Expanse and bring it to fruition there!"
"There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"
"There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"
"There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

languages.text: “不必撤销最后的命令。你们将身负这道命令，进入科罗努斯扩区，并在那里把它执行到底！”
languages.original_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

traits.locale_text: “不必撤销最后的命令。你们将身负这道命令，进入科罗努斯扩区，并在那里把它执行到底！”

languages.text: "Son Emir'i iptal etmeye gerek yok. Emre uyup Koronus Enginliği'ne gidecek ve orada yerine getireceksiniz!"
languages.original_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

traits.locale_text: "Son Emir'i iptal etmeye gerek yok. Emre uyup Koronus Enginliği'ne gidecek ve orada yerine getireceksiniz!"

languages.text: « Inutile de révoquer l'Ordre ultime. Vous le suivrez dans les Étendues de Koronus et l'exécuterez là-bas ! »
languages.original_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

traits.locale_text: « Inutile de révoquer l'Ordre ultime. Vous le suivrez dans les Étendues de Koronus et l'exécuterez là-bas ! »

languages.text: «No hay necesidad de anular la última orden. ¡La seguirán hasta la Extensión de Koronus y la completarán allí!».
languages.original_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

traits.locale_text: «No hay necesidad de anular la última orden. ¡La seguirán hasta la Extensión de Koronus y la completarán allí!».

languages.text: "Es ist nicht nötig, den letzten Befehl aufzuheben. Ihr werdet ihm in die Koronus-Ausdehnung folgen und es dort zu Ende bringen!"
languages.original_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

traits.locale_text: "Es ist nicht nötig, den letzten Befehl aufzuheben. Ihr werdet ihm in die Koronus-Ausdehnung folgen und es dort zu Ende bringen!"

languages.text: 「最後の命令を取り消す必要はない。貴様らはそれをコロヌス・エクスパンスまで携え、かの地で完遂するのだ！」
languages.original_text: "There is no need to revoke the Final Order. You shall follow it into the Koronus Expanse and complete it there!"

traits.locale_text: 「最後の命令を取り消す必要はない。貴様らはそれをコロヌス・エクスパンスまで携え、かの地で完遂するのだ！」
